name: FieldEdge HVAC Field Service API
what_it_does: FieldEdge REST API for HVAC and plumbing field service management software. Enables AI agents to manage customer accounts and service history, schedule and dispatch HVAC technicians, handle service agreements and preventive maintenance contracts, process estimates and invoices, track technician location and job status, access equipment and warranty data, integrate with QuickBooks for accounting, and connect field service data with parts suppliers and manufacturer systems.
use_cases: Scheduling and dispatching HVAC technicians from field service automation agents
Managing service agreements and preventive maintenance from contract management agents
Processing estimates and invoices from billing automation agents
Tracking technician performance and job profitability from analytics agents
not_for: General field service without HVAC or plumbing specialty focus
Large commercial construction without residential service workflow
Landscaping or tree care without mechanical systems service
best_when: An HVAC or plumbing contractor using FieldEdge wants AI agents to automate scheduling, dispatching, service agreement management, and QuickBooks billing integration.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Customer service history and home access records are sensitive. Employee location tracking requires proper disclosure. Service agreement data may include sensitive equipment and property details.

auth.notes: FieldEdge uses API key and OAuth 2.0 for API access. Account-level credentials. QuickBooks integration has separate OAuth flow. Partner program for technology integrations. Scopes control customer, dispatch, and billing data.

pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user monthly pricing; different plans for office and field users
pricing.notes: Clearwater, Florida. IFS company (acquired 2019). One of the oldest HVAC software providers. Strong QuickBooks integration. Competes with ServiceTitan, Jobber, and Housecall Pro. Focus on residential and light commercial HVAC and plumbing contractors.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Customer home access records and service history are sensitive
No public MCP server — REST API with OAuth2 and API key
QuickBooks integration uses separate OAuth flow — dual auth management required
Employee technician location data requires proper worker disclosure
Service agreement automation must handle renewal billing carefully
IFS acquisition — API roadmap follows IFS enterprise FSM strategy
agent_readiness.security_notes: Customer home service data and financial records. PCI-DSS, SOC2. OAuth2 + API key. US data residency. QuickBooks integration requires separate OAuth.

security_score_components.security_notes: Customer home service and financial data. PCI-DSS, SOC2. OAuth2 + API key. US data residency. Dual auth for QuickBooks integration.
